title: integ-test-runner input
description: Required dispatch-context keys for the integ-test-runner role, per agents/integ-test-runner.md Inputs section. Consumed by callers for pre-dispatch validation only -- never appended to the prompt or shown to the LLM.

environmentReady.description: True once the deployer has brought the integration test environment up and it is reachable; the integ-test-runner does not bring the environment up itself.
